verses.latin_vulgate: Locutus est Dominus ad Moysen in deserto Sinai anno secundo, postquam egressi sunt de terra Ægypti, mense primo, dicens :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְדַבֵּ֣ר יְהֹוָ֣ה אֶל־מֹשֶׁ֣ה בְמִדְבַּר־סִ֠ינַ֠י בַּשָּׁנָ֨ה הַשֵּׁנִ֜ית לְצֵאתָ֨ם מֵאֶ֧רֶץ מִצְרַ֛יִם בַּחֹ֥דֶשׁ הָרִאשׁ֖וֹן לֵאמֹֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: The Lord spoke to Moses in the desert of Sinai, the second year after they were come out of the land of Egypt, in the first month, saying:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Herra puhui Mosekselle Sinain korvessa, toisena vuonna sittekuin he olivat lähteneet Egyptin maalta, ensimäisenä kuukautena, sanoen:
verses.king_james: And the Lord spake unto Moses in the wilderness of Sinai, in the first month of the second year after they were come out of the land of Egypt, saying,

verses.latin_vulgate: Faciant filii Israël Phase in tempore suo,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְיַעֲשׂ֧וּ בְנֵי־יִשְׂרָאֵ֛ל אֶת־הַפָּ֖סַח בְּמוֹעֲדֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Let the children of Israel make the phase in its due time,
verses.finnish_biblia: Israelin lasten pitää pääsiäistä pitämän määrätyllä ajallansa:
verses.king_james: Let the children of Israel also keep the passover at his appointed season.

verses.latin_vulgate: quartadecima die mensis hujus ad vesperam, juxta omnes cæremonias et justificationes ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּאַרְבָּעָ֣ה עָשָֽׂר־י֠וֹם בַּחֹ֨דֶשׁ הַזֶּ֜ה בֵּ֧ין הָֽעַרְבַּ֛יִם תַּעֲשׂ֥וּ אֹת֖וֹ בְּמֹעֲד֑וֹ כְּכׇל־חֻקֹּתָ֥יו וּכְכׇל־מִשְׁפָּטָ֖יו תַּעֲשׂ֥וּ אֹתֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: The fourteenth day of this month in the evening, according to all the ceremonies and justifications thereof.
verses.finnish_biblia: Neljäntenätoistakymmenentenä päivänä tällä kuulla kahden ehtoon välillä, pitää heidän sen pitämän, ajallansa: kaikkein säätyinsä ja kaikkein oikeuttensa jälkeen pitää teidän sen tekemän.
verses.king_james: In the fourteenth day of this month, at even, ye shall keep it in his appointed season: according to all the rites of it, and according to all the ceremonies thereof, shall ye keep it.

verses.latin_vulgate: Præcepitque Moyses filiis Israël ut facerent Phase.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְדַבֵּ֥ר מֹשֶׁ֛ה אֶל־בְּנֵ֥י יִשְׂרָאֵ֖ל לַעֲשֹׂ֥ת הַפָּֽסַח׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Moses commanded the children of Israel that they should make the phase.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Moses puhui Israelin lapsille, että heidän piti pääsiäistä pitämän.
verses.king_james: And Moses spake unto the children of Israel, that they should keep the passover.

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui fecerunt tempore suo, quartadecima die mensis ad vesperam, in monte Sinai. Juxta omnia quæ mandaverat Dominus Moysi, fecerunt filii Israël.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּעֲשׂ֣וּ אֶת־הַפֶּ֡סַח בָּרִאשׁ֡וֹן בְּאַרְבָּעָה֩ עָשָׂ֨ר י֥וֹם לַחֹ֛דֶשׁ בֵּ֥ין הָעַרְבַּ֖יִם בְּמִדְבַּ֣ר סִינָ֑י כְּ֠כֹ֠ל אֲשֶׁ֨ר צִוָּ֤ה יְהֹוָה֙ אֶת־מֹשֶׁ֔ה כֵּ֥ן עָשׂ֖וּ בְּנֵ֥י יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: And they made it in its proper time: the fourteenth day of the month at evening, in mount Sinai. The children of Israel did according to all things that the Lord had commanded Moses.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja he pitivät pääsiäistä neljäntenä päivänä toistakymmentä ensimäisellä kuulla, kahden ehtoon välillä, Sinain korvessa: kaiken sen jälkeen minkä Herra oli Mosekselle käskenyt, niin tekivät Israelin lapset.
verses.king_james: And they kept the passover on the fourteenth day of the first month at even in the wilderness of Sinai: according to all that the Lord commanded Moses, so did the children of Israel.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ecce autem quidam immundi super anima hominis, qui non poterant facere Phase in die illo, accedentes ad Moysen et Aaron,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְהִ֣י אֲנָשִׁ֗ים אֲשֶׁ֨ר הָי֤וּ טְמֵאִים֙ לְנֶ֣פֶשׁ אָדָ֔ם וְלֹא־יָכְל֥וּ לַעֲשֹׂת־הַפֶּ֖סַח בַּיּ֣וֹם הַה֑וּא וַֽיִּקְרְב֞וּ לִפְנֵ֥י מֹשֶׁ֛ה וְלִפְנֵ֥י אַהֲרֹ֖ן בַּיּ֥וֹם הַהֽוּא׃
verses.douay_rheims: But behold some who were unclean by occasion of the soul of a man, who could not make the phase on that day, coming to Moses and Aaron,
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin siellä oli muutamia miehiä, jotka olivat saastaantuneet kuolleessa ihmisessä, niin ettei he saaneet pitää pääsiäistä sinä päivänä, ja he menivät sinä päivänä Moseksen ja Aaronin eteen.
verses.king_james: And there were certain men, who were defiled by the dead body of a man, that they could not keep the passover on that day: and they came before Moses and before Aaron on that day:

verses.latin_vulgate: dixerunt eis : Immundi sumus super anima hominis : quare fraudamur ut non valeamus oblationem offerre Domino in tempore suo inter filios Israël ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַ֠יֹּאמְר֠וּ הָאֲנָשִׁ֤ים הָהֵ֙מָּה֙ אֵלָ֔יו אֲנַ֥חְנוּ טְמֵאִ֖ים לְנֶ֣פֶשׁ אָדָ֑ם לָ֣מָּה נִגָּרַ֗ע לְבִלְתִּ֨י הַקְרִ֜יב אֶת־קׇרְבַּ֤ן יְהֹוָה֙ בְּמֹ֣עֲד֔וֹ בְּת֖וֹךְ בְּנֵ֥י יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: Said to them: We are unclean by occasion of the soul of a man. Why are we kept back that we may not offer in its season the offering to the Lord among the children of Israel?
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja ne miehet sanoivat hänelle: me olemme saastaantuneet kuolleesta ihmisestä: miksi me niin ylönkatsottuna pidetään, ettemme saa uhrata lahjojamme aikanansa Israelin lasten seassa?
verses.king_james: And those men said unto him, We are defiled by the dead body of a man: wherefore are we kept back, that we may not offer an offering of the Lord in his appointed season among the children of Israel?

verses.latin_vulgate: Quibus respondit Moyses : State ut consulam quid præcipiat Dominus de vobis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֥אמֶר אֲלֵהֶ֖ם מֹשֶׁ֑ה עִמְד֣וּ וְאֶשְׁמְעָ֔ה מַה־יְצַוֶּ֥ה יְהֹוָ֖ה לָכֶֽם׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: And Moses answered them: Stay that I may consult the Lord what he will ordain concerning you.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Moses sanoi heille: seisokaat, minä tahdon kuulla, mitä Herra käskee teille.
verses.king_james: And Moses said unto them, Stand still, and I will hear what the Lord will command concerning you.

verses.latin_vulgate: Locutusque est Dominus ad Moysen, dicens :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְדַבֵּ֥ר יְהֹוָ֖ה אֶל־מֹשֶׁ֥ה לֵּאמֹֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the Lord spoke to Moses, saying:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Herra puhui Mosekselle, sanoen:
verses.king_james: And the Lord spake unto Moses, saying,

verses.latin_vulgate: Loquere filiis Israël : Homo, qui fuerit immundus super anima, sive in via procul in gente vestra, faciat Phase Domino
verses.hebrew_masoretic: דַּבֵּ֛ר אֶל־בְּנֵ֥י יִשְׂרָאֵ֖ל לֵאמֹ֑ר אִ֣ישׁ אִ֣ישׁ כִּי־יִהְיֶֽה־טָמֵ֣א ׀ לָנֶ֡פֶשׁ אוֹ֩ בְדֶ֨רֶךְ רְחֹקָ֜הׄ לָכֶ֗ם א֚וֹ לְדֹרֹ֣תֵיכֶ֔ם וְעָ֥שָׂה פֶ֖סַח לַיהֹוָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Say to the children of Israel: The man that shall be unclean by occasion of one that is dead, or shall be in a journey afar off in your nation, let him make the phase to the Lord.
verses.finnish_biblia: Puhu Israelin lapsille, sanoen: kuka ikänä saastuttaa itsensä kuolleessa, elikkä on taampana kaukaisella matkalla teistä, taikka teidän lankoinne seassa, hänen pitää kuitenkin pitämän pääsiäistä Herralle.
verses.king_james: Speak unto the children of Israel, saying, If any man of you or of your posterity shall be unclean by reason of a dead body, or be in a journey afar off, yet he shall keep the passover unto the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: in mense secundo, quartadecima die mensis ad vesperam. Cum azymis et lactucis agrestibus comedent illud :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בַּחֹ֨דֶשׁ הַשֵּׁנִ֜י בְּאַרְבָּעָ֨ה עָשָׂ֥ר י֛וֹם בֵּ֥ין הָעַרְבַּ֖יִם יַעֲשׂ֣וּ אֹת֑וֹ עַל־מַצּ֥וֹת וּמְרֹרִ֖ים יֹאכְלֻֽהוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: In the second month, on the fourteenth day of the month in the evening, they shall eat it with unleavened bread and wild lettuce:
verses.finnish_biblia: Vaan toisella kuulla, neljäntenä päivänä toistakymmentä, kahden ehtoon välillä, pitää heidän sen tekemän, ja heidän pitää sen syömän happamattoman leivän ja karvasten ruohoin kanssa.
verses.king_james: The fourteenth day of the second month at even they shall keep it, and eat it with unleavened bread and bitter herbs.

verses.latin_vulgate: non relinquent ex eo quippiam usque mane, et os ejus non confringent : omnem ritum Phase observabunt.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לֹֽא־יַשְׁאִ֤ירוּ מִמֶּ֙נּוּ֙ עַד־בֹּ֔קֶר וְעֶ֖צֶם לֹ֣א יִשְׁבְּרוּ־ב֑וֹ כְּכׇל־חֻקַּ֥ת הַפֶּ֖סַח יַעֲשׂ֥וּ אֹתֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: They shall not leave any thing thereof until morning, nor break a bone thereof, they shall observe all the ceremonies of the phase.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ei pidä heidän siitä mitäkään tähteeksi jättämän huomeneksi, eikä luuta siitä rikkoman: kaikkein pääsiäissäätyin jälkeen pitää heidän sen tekemän.
verses.king_james: They shall leave none of it unto the morning, nor break any bone of it: according to all the ordinances of the passover they shall keep it.

verses.latin_vulgate: Si quis autem et mundus est, et in itinere non fuit, et tamen non fecit Phase, exterminabitur anima illa de populis suis, quia sacrificium Domino non obtulit tempore suo : peccatum suum ipse portabit.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהָאִישׁ֩ אֲשֶׁר־ה֨וּא טָה֜וֹר וּבְדֶ֣רֶךְ לֹא־הָיָ֗ה וְחָדַל֙ לַעֲשׂ֣וֹת הַפֶּ֔סַח וְנִכְרְתָ֛ה הַנֶּ֥פֶשׁ הַהִ֖וא מֵֽעַמֶּ֑יהָ כִּ֣י ׀ קׇרְבַּ֣ן יְהֹוָ֗ה לֹ֤א הִקְרִיב֙ בְּמֹ֣עֲד֔וֹ חֶטְא֥וֹ יִשָּׂ֖א הָאִ֥ישׁ הַהֽוּא׃
verses.douay_rheims: But if any man is clean, and was not on a journey, and did not make the phase, that soul shall be cut off from among his people, because he offered not sacrifice to the Lord in due season: he shall bear his sin.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta joka puhdas on, ja ei ole matkalla, ja unhottaa pitää pääsiäistä, hänen sielunsa pitää hävitettämän kansoistansa. Sentähden ettei hän ole kantanut uhrinansa Herralle määrätyllä ajallansa, sen pitää itse syntinsä kantaman.
verses.king_james: But the man that is clean, and is not in a journey, and forbeareth to keep the passover, even the same soul shall be cut off from among his people: because he brought not the offering of the Lord in his appointed season, that man shall bear his sin.

verses.latin_vulgate: Peregrinus quoque et advena si fuerint apud vos, facient Phase Domino juxta cæremonias et justificationes ejus. Præceptum idem erit apud vos tam advenæ quam indigenæ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְכִֽי־יָג֨וּר אִתְּכֶ֜ם גֵּ֗ר וְעָ֤שָֽׂה פֶ֙סַח֙ לַֽיהֹוָ֔ה כְּחֻקַּ֥ת הַפֶּ֛סַח וּכְמִשְׁפָּט֖וֹ כֵּ֣ן יַעֲשֶׂ֑ה חֻקָּ֤ה אַחַת֙ יִהְיֶ֣ה לָכֶ֔ם וְלַגֵּ֖ר וּלְאֶזְרַ֥ח הָאָֽרֶץ׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: The sojourner also and the stranger if they be among you, shall make the phase to the Lord according to the ceremonies and justifications thereof. The same ordinances shall be with you both for the stranger, and for him that was born in the land.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja jos joku muukalainen asuu teidän seassanne, ja pitää myös Herralle pääsiäistä: pääsiäisen säätyin ja oikeutten jälkeen hänen sen pitämän pitää. Tämä sääty pitää teille yhtäläinen oleman, niin muukalaiselle kuin omaisellekin maassa.
verses.king_james: And if a stranger shall sojourn among you, and will keep the passover unto the Lord; according to the ordinance of the passover, and according to the manner thereof, so shall he do: ye shall have one ordinance, both for the stranger, and for him that was born in the land.

verses.latin_vulgate: Igitur die qua erectum est tabernaculum, operuit illud nubes. A vespere autem super tentorium erat quasi species ignis usque mane.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבְיוֹם֙ הָקִ֣ים אֶת־הַמִּשְׁכָּ֔ן כִּסָּ֤ה הֶֽעָנָן֙ אֶת־הַמִּשְׁכָּ֔ן לְאֹ֖הֶל הָעֵדֻ֑ת וּבָעֶ֜רֶב יִהְיֶ֧ה עַֽל־הַמִּשְׁכָּ֛ן כְּמַרְאֵה־אֵ֖שׁ עַד־בֹּֽקֶר׃
verses.douay_rheims: Now on the day that the tabernacle was reared up, a cloud covered it. But from the evening there was over the tabernacle, as it were, the appearance of fire until the morning.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja sinä päivänä kuin Tabernakli pantiin ylös, varjosi pilvi todistuksen majan, ja oli ehtoosta niin aamuun asti majan päällä, niinkuin tuli.
verses.king_james: And on the day that the tabernacle was reared up the cloud covered the tabernacle, namely, the tent of the testimony: and at even there was upon the tabernacle as it were the appearance of fire, until the morning.

verses.latin_vulgate: Sic fiebat jugiter : per diem operiebat illud nubes, et per noctem quasi species ignis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כֵּ֚ן יִהְיֶ֣ה תָמִ֔יד הֶעָנָ֖ן יְכַסֶּ֑נּוּ וּמַרְאֵה־אֵ֖שׁ לָֽיְלָה׃
verses.douay_rheims: So it was always: by day the cloud covered it, and by night as it were the appearance of fire.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin tapahtui alati, että pilvi varjosi sen ja näkyi yöllä niinkuin tuli.
verses.king_james: So it was alway: the cloud covered it by day, and the appearance of fire by night.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cumque ablata fuisset nubes, quæ tabernaculum protegebat, tunc proficiscebantur filii Israël : et in loco ubi stetisset nubes, ibi castrametabantur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּלְפִ֞י הֵעָל֤וֹת הֶֽעָנָן֙ מֵעַ֣ל הָאֹ֔הֶל וְאַ֣חֲרֵי כֵ֔ן יִסְע֖וּ בְּנֵ֣י יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל וּבִמְק֗וֹם אֲשֶׁ֤ר יִשְׁכׇּן־שָׁם֙ הֶֽעָנָ֔ן שָׁ֥ם יַחֲנ֖וּ בְּנֵ֥י יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: And when the cloud that covered the tabernacle was taken up, then the children of Israel marched forward: and in the place where the cloud stood still, there they camped.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja kuin pilvi nousi majan päältä, niin vaelsivat Israelin lapset, ja kuhunka paikkaan pilvi seisahti, siinä myös Israelin lapset heitänsä sioittivat.
verses.king_james: And when the cloud was taken up from the tabernacle, then after that the children of Israel journeyed: and in the place where the cloud abode, there the children of Israel pitched their tents.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ad imperium Domini proficiscebantur, et ad imperium illius figebant tabernaculum. Cunctis diebus quibus stabat nubes super tabernaculum, manebant in eodem loco :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עַל־פִּ֣י יְהֹוָ֗ה יִסְעוּ֙ בְּנֵ֣י יִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל וְעַל־פִּ֥י יְהֹוָ֖ה יַחֲנ֑וּ כׇּל־יְמֵ֗י אֲשֶׁ֨ר יִשְׁכֹּ֧ן הֶעָנָ֛ן עַל־הַמִּשְׁכָּ֖ן יַחֲנֽוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: At the commandment of the Lord they marched, and at his commandment they pitched the tabernacle. All the days that the cloud abode over the tabernacle, they remained in the same place:
verses.finnish_biblia: Herran sanan jälkeen vaelsivat Israelin lapset, ja Herran sanan jälkeen he myös heitänsä sioittivat: aina niinkauvan kuin pilvi pysyi majan päällä, pysyivät he myös siallansa.
verses.king_james: At the commandment of the Lord the children of Israel journeyed, and at the commandment of the Lord they pitched: as long as the cloud abode upon the tabernacle they rested in their tents.

verses.latin_vulgate: et si evenisset ut multo tempore maneret super illud, erant filii Israël in excubiis Domini, et non proficiscebantur
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבְהַאֲרִ֧יךְ הֶֽעָנָ֛ן עַל־הַמִּשְׁכָּ֖ן יָמִ֣ים רַבִּ֑ים וְשָׁמְר֧וּ בְנֵי־יִשְׂרָאֵ֛ל אֶת־מִשְׁמֶ֥רֶת יְהֹוָ֖ה וְלֹ֥א יִסָּֽעוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And if it was so that it continued over it a long time, the children of Israel kept the watches of the Lord, and marched not,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja koska pilvi usiammat päivät pysyi majan päällä, niin ottivat Israelin lapset vaarin Herran vartiosta, ja ei vaeltaneet.
verses.king_james: And when the cloud tarried long upon the tabernacle many days, then the children of Israel kept the charge of the Lord, and journeyed not.

verses.latin_vulgate: quot diebus fuisset nubes super tabernaculum. Ad imperium Domini erigebant tentoria, et ad imperium illius deponebant.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְיֵ֞שׁ אֲשֶׁ֨ר יִהְיֶ֧ה הֶֽעָנָ֛ן יָמִ֥ים מִסְפָּ֖ר עַל־הַמִּשְׁכָּ֑ן עַל־פִּ֤י יְהֹוָה֙ יַחֲנ֔וּ וְעַל־פִּ֥י יְהֹוָ֖ה יִסָּֽעוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: For as many days soever as the cloud stayed over the tabernacle. At the commandment of the Lord they pitched their tents, and at his commandment they took them down.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja koska niin tapahtui, että pilvi oli järjestänsä monikahdat päivät majan päällä, niin he sioittivat heitänsä Herran sanan jälkeen, ja Herran sanan jälkeen he myös vaelsivat.
verses.king_james: And so it was, when the cloud was a few days upon the tabernacle; according to the commandment of the Lord they abode in their tents, and according to the commandment of the Lord they journeyed.

verses.latin_vulgate: Si fuisset nubes a vespere usque mane, et statim diluculo tabernaculum reliquisset, proficiscebantur : et si post diem et noctem recessisset, dissipabant tentoria.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְיֵ֞שׁ אֲשֶׁר־יִהְיֶ֤ה הֶֽעָנָן֙ מֵעֶ֣רֶב עַד־בֹּ֔קֶר וְנַעֲלָ֧ה הֶֽעָנָ֛ן בַּבֹּ֖קֶר וְנָסָ֑עוּ א֚וֹ יוֹמָ֣ם וָלַ֔יְלָה וְנַעֲלָ֥ה הֶעָנָ֖ן וְנָסָֽעוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: If the cloud tarried from evening until morning, and immediately at break of day left the tabernacle, they marched forward: and if it departed after a day and a night, they took down their tents.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja jos se niin tapahtui, että pilvi aina ehtoosta niin huomeneen asti oli majan päällä, ja sitte aamulla nousi, niin he vaelsivat, eli koska pilvi päivällä taikka yöllä nousi, niin he myös vaelsivat.
verses.king_james: And so it was, when the cloud abode from even unto the morning, and that the cloud was taken up in the morning, then they journeyed: whether it was by day or by night that the cloud was taken up, they journeyed.

verses.latin_vulgate: Si vero biduo aut uno mense vel longiori tempore fuisset super tabernaculum, manebant filii Israël in eodem loco, et non proficiscebantur : statim autem ut recessisset, movebant castra.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֽוֹ־יֹמַ֜יִם אוֹ־חֹ֣דֶשׁ אוֹ־יָמִ֗ים בְּהַאֲרִ֨יךְ הֶעָנָ֤ן עַל־הַמִּשְׁכָּן֙ לִשְׁכֹּ֣ן עָלָ֔יו יַחֲנ֥וּ בְנֵֽי־יִשְׂרָאֵ֖ל וְלֹ֣א יִסָּ֑עוּ וּבְהֵעָלֹת֖וֹ יִסָּֽעוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: But if it remained over the tabernacle for two days or a month or a longer time, the children of Israel remained in the same place, and marched not: but immediately as soon as it departed, they removed the camp.
verses.finnish_biblia: Eli koska pilvi kaksi päivää eli kuukauden taikka muutoin kauvan aikaa pysyi majan päällä, niin Israelin lapset sioittivat heitänsä, ja ei matkustaneet, ja koska se nousi, niin he matkustivat.
verses.king_james: Or whether it were two days, or a month, or a year, that the cloud tarried upon the tabernacle, remaining thereon, the children of Israel abode in their tents, and journeyed not: but when it was taken up, they journeyed.

verses.latin_vulgate: Per verbum Domini figebant tentoria, et per verbum illius proficiscebantur : erantque in excubiis Domini juxta imperium ejus per manum Moysi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עַל־פִּ֤י יְהֹוָה֙ יַחֲנ֔וּ וְעַל־פִּ֥י יְהֹוָ֖ה יִסָּ֑עוּ אֶת־מִשְׁמֶ֤רֶת יְהֹוָה֙ שָׁמָ֔רוּ עַל־פִּ֥י יְהֹוָ֖ה בְּיַד־מֹשֶֽׁה׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: By the word of the Lord they pitched their tents, and by his word they marched: and kept the watches of the Lord according to his commandment by the hand of Moses.
verses.finnish_biblia: Herran käskyn jälkeen olivat he siallansa, ja Herran käskyn jälkeen he matkustivat, ja ottivat vaarin Herran vartiosta, Herran sanan jälkeen Moseksen kautta.
verses.king_james: At the commandment of the Lord they rested in the tents, and at the commandment of the Lord they journeyed: they kept the charge of the Lord, at the commandment of the Lord by the hand of Moses.
